queries.question: What credit cards have a limit of 5000 and what debit cards have the same limit?
queries.sql:
SELECT _Bank_Cards.card_number 
FROM _Bank_Cards JOIN Limits ON _Bank_Cards.card_id = Limits.card_id
WHERE (_Bank_Cards._bank_card_type = "Credit Card" OR _Bank_Cards._bank_card_type = "Debit Card") AND Limits.card_limit = 5000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?card_number WHERE {
  ?_bank_cards a :Bank_Cards .
  ?limits a :Limits .
  ?limits p:hasBank_Cards ?_bank_cards .
  ?_bank_cards p:card_number ?card_number .
  ?_bank_cards p:bank_card_type ?_bank_card_type_w .
  ?_bank_cards p:bank_card_type ?_bank_card_type_w2 .
  ?limits p:card_limit ?card_limit_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?_bank_card_type_w) = "Credit Card" || STR(?_bank_card_type_w2) = "Debit Card")) && (STR(?card_limit_w) = "5000" || STR(?card_limit_w) = "5000.0")))
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all credit cards and also provide a list of debit cards with a limit of 5000.
queries.sql:
SELECT _Bank_Cards.card_number 
FROM _Bank_Cards JOIN Limits ON _Bank_Cards.card_id = Limits.card_id
WHERE _Bank_Cards._bank_card_type = "Credit Card" OR _Bank_Cards._bank_card_type = "Debit Card" AND Limits.card_limit = 5000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?card_number WHERE {
  ?_bank_cards a :Bank_Cards .
  ?limits a :Limits .
  ?limits p:hasBank_Cards ?_bank_cards .
  ?_bank_cards p:card_number ?card_number .
  ?_bank_cards p:bank_card_type ?_bank_card_type_w .
  ?_bank_cards p:bank_card_type ?_bank_card_type_w2 .
  ?limits p:card_limit ?card_limit_w .
  FILTER((STR(?_bank_card_type_w) = "Credit Card" || (STR(?_bank_card_type_w2) = "Debit Card" && (STR(?card_limit_w) = "5000" || STR(?card_limit_w) = "5000.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show credit cards and debit cards with a limit of 5000.
